# Button

## Description
A clickable button for actions.

## Props
- label: string — Label text
- onClick: function — Click handler
- disabled: boolean — Disabled flag

## Category
input

## Tags
input, action

## Version
1.2.0

## Author
design-team

## Example
```jsx
<Button label="Save" onClick={() => {}} disabled={false} />
```
